allow: PowerShell($cmds = @\('node','nvm','fnm','winget','choco','volta'\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { try { $ver = & $c --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1 } catch { $ver = '?' }; "$c -> $\($g.Source\) \($ver\)" } else { "$c -> not found" } })

PowerShell($nvmHome = \(Get-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\Session Manager\\Environment' -Name 'NVM_HOME' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).NVM_HOME; $nvmSymlink = \(Get-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\Session Manager\\Environment' -Name 'NVM_SYMLINK' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).NVM_SYMLINK; "NVM_HOME from registry: $nvmHome"; "NVM_SYMLINK from registry: $nvmSymlink"; "---"; "Existing nodejs dir:"; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,LinkType,Target | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("Program Files\\nodejs exists: $\(Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs'\)"; "C:\\nvm4w\\nodejs exists: $\(Test-Path 'C:\\nvm4w\\nodejs'\)"; "node on PATH: $\(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; & 'C:\\Users\\AJAlk\\AppData\\Local\\nvm\\nvm.exe' version)
